message:
test(wchar_abi): expand wchar test coverage from 16 to 105 tests

Cover wcslen, wcscpy/wcsncpy, wcscat/wcsncat, wcscmp/wcsncmp, wcschr/
wcsrchr/wcschrnul, wcsstr, wcsspn/wcscspn/wcspbrk, wcstok, wmemcpy/
wmemmove/wmemset/wmemcmp/wmemchr/wmemrchr, wcsdup, wcpcpy/wcpncpy,
wcscasecmp/wcsncasecmp, wcslcpy/wcslcat, wcstoimax/wcstoumax, towupper/
towlower, all isw* classification, wcwidth, wctype/iswctype, locale _l
variants, mblen/mbtowc/wctomb, mbstowcs/wcstombs, mbsinit/mbrlen,
mbsnrtowcs/wcsnrtombs, basename/dirname, swprintf/swscanf, c32rtomb/
mbrtoc32, c16rtomb/mbrtoc16.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
